name: ai-ops-studio
description: Full-stack AI workflow platform for structured requirements, operations decision support, and RAG evaluation.

scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @ai-ops-studio/shared && npm run build -w @ai-ops-studio/api && npm run build -w @ai-ops-studio/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run db:generate && npm run typecheck -w @ai-ops-studio/shared && npm run typecheck -w @ai-ops-studio/api && npm run typecheck -w @ai-ops-studio/web
scripts.test: npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @ai-ops-studio/shared && npm run test -w @ai-ops-studio/api
